title: Roasted Sweet Potato Chaat
description: Warm roasted sweet potato with lemon, cumin, and chaat masala for a satisfying winter snack.
explanation: This is deliberately a seasonal snack rather than a lunch main. Roast the sweet potato until caramelized, then dress it only at the end so it stays crisp at the edges.
ingredients: 2 medium Sweet Potatoes, scrubbed and cubed
instructions: Toss sweet potato with oil and a pinch of salt. Roast at 220°C until tender and browned, about 25 minutes.
Transfer to a bowl while warm.
Add cumin, chaat masala, lemon, optional onion, and coriander.
